title: helleborine ovalis
intro: Helleborine ovalis, also known as the lady's smock or rosy helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of helleborine ovalis include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Helleborine ovalis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
